name: driver-recruitment-hub
description: Driver Recruitment Hub - Full QA Test Suite

scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration
scripts.test:e2e: cd frontend && npx playwright test tests/e2e/smoke.spec.ts
scripts.test:edge: cd frontend && npx playwright test tests/e2e/edge-cases.spec.ts
scripts.test:security: npm run test:security:pen && npm run test:security:deps
scripts.test:performance: npm run test:perf:load && npm run test:perf:spike
scripts.test:all: npm run test && npm run test:e2e && npm run test:security && npm run test:performance
scripts.test:ci: npm run test && npm run test:e2e
scripts.dev: concurrently "cd backend && npm run dev" "cd frontend && npm run dev"
scripts.build: cd backend && npm run build && cd ../frontend && npm run build
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.db:migrate: cd backend && npx prisma migrate deploy
scripts.db:seed: cd backend && npx prisma db seed
scripts.lint: cd backend && npm run lint && cd ../frontend && npm run lint
scripts.typecheck: cd backend && npm run typecheck && cd ../frontend && npm run typecheck
